steps.title: Find the paint ratio
steps.content:
The first batch uses $2$ ounces of blue paint and $3$ ounces of yellow paint. The ratio of yellow paint to blue paint is
$$\frac{3}{2}=1.5$$

steps.title: Apply the same ratio
steps.content:
The second batch must use yellow paint equal to $1.5$ times its blue paint. With $5$ ounces of blue paint, that amount is
$$1.5(5)=7.5$$The correct description is $1.5$ times the amount of blue paint used in the second batch. The answer is D.
